first_paragraph: ***Seeing Ear Theater*** was an internet based drama/re-enactment troupe attempting to capture the feel of older [scifi](/wiki/Scifi "Scifi") [radio plays](/wiki/Radio_plays "Radio plays"). The content was originally maintained on the [SciFi.com](/wiki/SciFi.com "SciFi.com") website and ran from 1997 to 2001. Episodes can be retrieved from the [Internet Archive](/wiki/Internet_Archive "Internet Archive"), but the episode numbers and dates are incorrect.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Drama Troupe

***Seeing Ear Theater*** was an internet based drama/re-enactment troupe attempting to capture the feel of older [scifi](/wiki/Scifi "Scifi") [radio plays](/wiki/Radio_plays "Radio plays"). The content was originally maintained on the [SciFi.com](/wiki/SciFi.com "SciFi.com") website and ran from 1997 to 2001. Episodes can be retrieved from the [Internet Archive](/wiki/Internet_Archive "Internet Archive"), but the episode numbers and dates are incorrect.
